name: Alkami Technology, Inc.
description: Alkami Technology, Inc. is a leading cloud-based digital banking solutions provider for financial institutions in the United States. The company enables community, regional, and super-regional banks and credit unions to digitalize their retail, business, and commercial banking operations. Through its single, unified platform, Alkami delivers a modern, secure, and highly customizable digital banking experience, offering tools for account opening, card management, financial wellness, and data analytics to drive user growth and engagement.
